kyutai-mcp (full)

This repository provides:

1) An MCP server (FastMCP 3.1+)
- Dual transport:
  - STDIO: IDE integration
  - HTTP: streamable MCP endpoint on /mcp for local web bridge use

2) A SOTA web dashboard (Vite + React + Tailwind)
- Fleet blueprint layout: sidebar + topbar + main + logger panel + chat modal
- Webapp ports:
  - backend: 10924
  - frontend: 10925

Tools
=====

moshi_ops(operation, include_env=False)

Operations:
- status: server runtime and platform summary
- local_viability: check GPU/VRAM and show next-step recommendations
- references: upstream links (FAQ, issues)
- recommend_runtime: recommended runtime choice for local-first success

Local Moshi viability note (RTX 4090)
====================================

Upstream indicates that 12GB GPUs can be made to work with tuning, and 8GB GPUs cannot.
Given RTX 4090 has 24GB VRAM, local runs are expected to be viable, but latency/quality
depends on runtime backend, quantization, and session length.

References:
- https://raw.githubusercontent.com/kyutai-labs/moshi/main/FAQ.md
- https://github.com/kyutai-labs/moshi/issues/54

Troubleshooting
===============

- If the webapp does not start, run: webapp\\start.ps1
- If ports are occupied, start.ps1 kills listeners for 10924/10925 before launch.
